caveat: PostHog is only instrumented on the new platform for US traffic (coupons-itier-global is tagged countryCode=IE only). PostHog cannot be used for legacy-vs-new comparison; it is a new-platform health monitor. Pre-May 8 numbers are undercounted because Cloudflare cache was preventing the PostHog snippet from firing on cached responses - data quality jumped 2.4x on May 8 when the cache bypass landed.

rates.interpretation: Rage and dead click RATES per pageview are flat across the cache fix - the visible spikes are pageview-measurement artifacts, not UX regression.

headline_today.interpretation: PostHog records ~2x the new-platform clicks that BQ's cohort labels imply. Corroborates the open BQ traffic_allocation labeling bug - more merchants are being served the new template than the labels say.
